summary: Iteration 91 - Mobile responsiveness, Logo placement, Producer→Seller translations, Certificates page optimization. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: All logo placements verified (header, footer, login, register, homepage). Certificates page working with 1-click product access. Translations correctly show 'Seller' instead of 'Producer' in English. Fixed critical runtime error on DiscoverPage (missing `t` from useTranslation).
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/certificates/products returns 200
BACKEND: Certificates products response has products array
BACKEND: Products have certifications array
BACKEND: Products have required fields (product_id, name, images, certifications)
BACKEND: Login endpoint exists
BACKEND: Register endpoint exists
BACKEND: GET /api/stores returns stores list
FRONTEND: Header logo visible (28-32px) next to 'Hispaloshop' text
FRONTEND: Footer logo visible with 'invert' class on dark background
FRONTEND: Login page logo visible next to 'Welcome Back'
FRONTEND: Register page logo visible (desktop view)
FRONTEND: Homepage hero section shows logo
FRONTEND: Mobile viewport (412px) has no horizontal overflow
FRONTEND: Mobile hamburger menu works correctly
FRONTEND: Mobile menu panel opens/closes
FRONTEND: Certificates page loads 6 certified products
FRONTEND: Certificates page has stacked filters (search + select) on mobile
FRONTEND: Certificate product cards are direct links (1-click access to product detail)
FRONTEND: Login page shows 'Are you a seller?' (not 'producer')
FRONTEND: Stores page shows 'Seller' badge (not 'Producer')
FRONTEND: Stores page CTA shows 'Are you a local seller?'
FRONTEND: Footer shows 'Seller Access' (not 'Producer Access')
FRONTEND: Discover page fixed - no more runtime error
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed DiscoverPage.js - was missing `const { t } = useTranslation();` causing runtime error
All Producer→Seller translations in en.json appear correct
Logo placement in header uses object-contain class for proper sizing
Footer logo correctly has 'invert' class for white appearance on dark bg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 tested the mobile responsiveness, logo placement, and Producer→Seller translation fixes. Key findings: 1) All logo placements working correctly across header, footer, login, register, and homepage. 2) Mobile viewport at 412px shows no horizontal overflow. 3) Certificates page loads 6 products with 1-click direct links. 4) English translations show 'Seller' not 'Producer'. 5) Fixed critical bug in DiscoverPage.js where `t` was undefined (missing useTranslation hook). Logo file is at /app/frontend/public/logo.png.
